titleStmt.title: SII 25.101: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 101. (A.R. No. 101 of 1908.) TIRUPPATTŪR, TIRUPPATTUR TALUK, RAMANATHAPURAM DISTRICT.

summary.p: South wall of the maṇḍapa in front of the central shrine in the Tiruttaḷīśvara temple.
The record is dated in the 4+1st year of the king which with other details of date viz., Kaṟkaṭaka 27, Saturday, Rōhiṇi correspond to 1166 A.D, July 23.

The record do not contain any praśasti unlike the other inscriptions of Kulaśēkhara. It states that the Mūlaparishai-mahāsabhai of Tiruppattūr, a brahmadēya in Kēraḷaśiṅga-vaḷanāḍu met at the Āyiratt-eḻunūṟṟuvaṉmaṇḍapa in the Tiruttaḷiyāṇḍa-nāyaṉār temple and declared the old dēvadāna lands of this temple as tax-free. The sabhai received 120 śōḻiyanaṟ-paḻaṅ-kāśu from the temple treasury as it required some money (śirududravyam) to go to Madurai to pay its respects to the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī tribhuvanaccakravattikaḷ śrī kulaśekharadevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 vatinetirāmāṇṭu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟirupatteḻān=tiyati caṉik
kiḻamaiyum peṟṟa rocaṇi nāḷ keraḷaciṅkavaḷanāṭṭu brahmadeyan=ti puttūr mulaparṣaimahā sabhaiyom tirut
taḷi Āṇṭa namāyaṉār śrīkoyilil Āyiratteḻunūṟṟuvantirumaṇṭattuk kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiyirun=tu sa
bhaiyom perumāḷ kulaśekharadaivarait tiruvaṭittoḻa maturaiyeṟa pokaikku ciṟutu dravam veṇṭiṉa
maiyil kuṭinilaṅkaḷil tiruttaḷi Āṇṭa nāyaṉār vilai koṇṭuṭaiya nilaṅkaḷilum dharmmattukku kuṭuttār kuṭutta
nilaṅkaḷilum Ivvūr vaṭavāy vayal veppaṅ kuṭivāykkāl kīḻ veppaṅkuṭivayal pulli mukkāṇi muṟṟum Iv
vūrt teṉvāy vayal peruvāykkāl kīḻ cen=taṉkkuṟicci vayaṟkāñcinaṅkaṇṇāṟuḷḷiṭ
jayan=tasvāmi paṭṭan muṟṟum pūticātta pāykkā vayakkalil pirivu nilam Araikkāṇik kīḻa
ye yorumāvarai mun=tirikaiyuṅkālum Āka Innilaṅkaḷ van=tatū �ḷ Innilam Orumāviṉ kīḻaraiyuminnāḷ p
paḻan=tevatāṉappaṭi candrādityavaṟ Iṟaiviḻaviṭṭuk kuṭuttu Innāyaṉār śrī paṇṭārattu sabhaiyom kaikkoṇṭa co
ḻiya naṟpaḻaṅkācu 100 2 10 Ikkācu nūṟṟirupatuṅ kaikkoṇṭu Iṟaiviḻaviṭṭu Ippaṭi kalveṭṭik kuṭutto
m mahāsabhaiyom Itu panmāheśvara rakṣai
Digital edition of SII 25.101 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
